atomicCrossChainUnshield((((uint256,uint.details: Validates proof on Hub, nullifies inputs, then burns via CCTP to Client.      Client will receive CCTP message and forward USDC to finalRecipient.

params.destinationCaller: Address allowed to call receiveMessage on Client (bytes32).        Use bytes32(0) to allow any relayer, or specify a relayer address for MEV protection.
params.finalRecipient: Address to receive USDC on client chain
params.maxFee: Maximum CCTP relayer fee in USDC raw units (deducted from burn amount at protocol level, 0 = no fee)

transact((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2].details: Validates proofs, nullifies inputs, creates new commitments      For local unshields, transfers tokens to recipient

transact((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2].notice: Execute private transactions (transfers and/or local unshields)
